\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Lightweight surface mesh container with file I/O and BC helpers. 

Responsibilities\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Store nodes, triangles, and unique edges (each geometric edge appears once).
\item Read meshes from several formats (.mesh, .mphtxt, .msh) and write .mesh.
\item Provide edge queries (index/length/vector) and triangle lists per domain.
\item Handle periodic boundary conditions via stored symmetry operations. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Destructor\+: frees BC ops and supplementary nodes/triangles. 

Destructor\+: free symmetry ops and supplementary mesh entities.

Frees\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item all Symmetry\+Operation\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} stored in {\ttfamily bcs} 
\item supplementary nodes added via \doxylink{classSurfaceMesh_af229438e36396cad9e4ca5dc11729b8d}{Add\+Node()}
\item supplementary triangles added via \doxylink{classSurfaceMesh_a7fddafcb2b9095d1e73bd3ecd05bb5e1}{Add\+Triangle()} 
\end{DoxyItemize}

\hline
\end{DoxyParams}

0 on success; non-\/zero on error.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Read custom "{}.\+mesh"{} format\+: nodes, then triangles (+ domains), detect edges.

Expected layout\+: $<Nnodes>$ x y z (repeated Nnodes times) $<Ntris>$ n1 n2 n3 d1 d2 (1-\/based node indices, two bordering domains)

\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}

\hline

\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
0 on success; non-\/zero on error.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Read mesh from a COMSOL 4.\+2 "{}.\+mphtxt"{} file and border-\/domain block.

Reads the node block, then the triangle connectivity (node indices), then the bordering domain pairs (d1,d2). Edges are detected uniquely.
